name: Wimarn Montra
original_name: วิมานมนตรา
overview: Because of being betrayed by the man you love So she does everything in her power to get rid of the enemy in her heart. Moreover, she also performs a ritual to hypnotize the soul of her lover. and sacrificed with the blood of a virgin in order to live an invincible life Waiting for a suitable body to become a new body

trailers.title: วิมานมนตรา [Official Trailer]
